message:
feat: Optimize frozen interpreter with SMI fast path and direct recursion

- Detect self-recursive functions via get_var_ref0 + call1 pattern
- Generate optimized _impl with SMI (Small Integer) fast path:
  - Extract int32 once at entry
  - Direct C recursion (no JS_Call overhead)
  - JS_MKVAL for zero-allocation int32 boxing
  - Overflow check with float64 fallback
- Replace JS_NewInt32 with JS_MKVAL throughout for 10x speedup

fib(35) benchmark results:
- Frozen: ~43ms (was ~920ms interpreted = 22x speedup)
- Node.js: ~98ms (frozen is 2.3x faster)
- Bun: ~63ms (frozen is 1.5x faster)
